semantic: constructs SourceFilter in buildFilter; calls current.IsEmpty and current.Match in constructor to set initial selection
uses ChannelItem as source list type; emits filterOverlayConfirmMsg and filterOverlayCancelMsg
uses titleStyle, helpDescStyle, selectedCardStyle, sourceTypeBadgeStyle, primaryColor (direct color reference for boxStyle)
uses keys.Down and keys.Up for navigation; other bindings matched via msg.String() directly
calls sourceTypeBadge helper defined in dashboard.go
